explanation_a_granularity.reason: UK has more curriculum concepts (397) than NRW (299), yet higher coverage

explanation_b_educational_philosophy.reason: Coverage trajectories match assessment structures: UK GCSE convergence, NRW Oberstufe divergence

F9.statement: Cross-system coverage divergence (34-82%) is best explained by educational philosophy differences, not curriculum granularity.

F10.statement: Coverage trajectories reveal assessment-driven vs specialization-driven curriculum design.
